summary: Tested all 10 new features: GameModeSelectPage redesign, 3 new letter-based categories, is_active toggle in admin, category card sizing, and full game flow. All features passing.
seed_data_creation: 3 letter-based categories already seeded: أمثال شعبية, حرف وكلمة, من أنا؟ with 20 questions each (total 60 questions). Temporarily deactivated and re-activated القدرات قياس to verify toggle.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features for iteration 15 tested and passing. is_active toggle works: deactivating a category removes it from /api/categories (returns 24), while /api/categories?show_inactive=true returns all 25. Admin sidebar shows inactive categories with opacity 0.45 (dim) and red dot indicator. 3 new categories confirmed present. GameModeSelectPage full-screen design with 2 large cards, standard badge الأكثر شيوعاً confirmed.

test_results.1_mode_page_fullscreen_2cards: PASS - /mode shows full-screen design with mode-standard-btn and mode-tournament-btn, الأكثر شيوعاً badge on standard card
test_results.4_category_cards_taller: PASS - categories page shows taller cards with larger images
test_results.5_three_new_categories: PASS - أمثال شعبية, حرف وكلمة, من أنا؟ all present in categories page
test_results.7_cat_active_toggle: PASS - cat-active-toggle checkbox present and functional in edit form
test_results.8_admin_shows_25_categories: PASS - 25 category items in admin sidebar
test_results.9_inactive_category_dim_red: PASS - inactive category shown with opacity 0.45 (dim), red dot elements present
